commit_semantics.frozen_code_commit: last commit where env/geometry/walker/collapse/unstick were allowed to change
commit_semantics.freeze_protocol_commit: records finalized gate criteria + teacher-qualification protocol

base_policy.role: frozen 0.89 offline-CRL actor; drives the route AFTER corridor handoff

env.collapse_rule: bury (absorbing) iff max horizontal-normal-force on a collapsible litter geom > collapse_force AND step precontact planar speed > collapse_speed; checked per substep; slick plate excluded; done stays False

u_side_semantics.distribution: U ~ Bernoulli(0.5), sampled once per reset from an rng stream independent of reset/goal streams
u_side_semantics.u_side=1: pile+skirt+reef+slick active on +y side ('pos'); clean half-corridor on -y
u_side_semantics.u_side=0: exact mirror image active on -y side ('neg'); clean half-corridor on +y
u_side_semantics.clean_lane_command: clean_sign = -1 if u_side==1 else +1; clean-lane y_ref = clean_sign * lane; pile-lane y_ref = -clean_sign * lane
u_side_semantics.source: crl/d4rl_ant.py:467 side_u={'pos':1,'neg':0}; walker_gate.py:64 clean=-1.0 if u_side==1 else 1.0

commands.slow_v_note: middle_slow/blind arm speed, passed via --slow-v 0.8; NOT probe.V_SLOW (default 0.6, used only in the walker training command-sampling range)

handoff.condition: latch handoff to base policy when xy[0] >= handoff_x OR xy[1] >= 2.0

unstick_middle_slow_only.note: part of the cautious (blind/middle_slow) policy DEFINITION; never given to naive arms

gate_criteria.G3_historical_strict_draft: middle_slow >= middle_fast + 0.20 (reported separately, NOT used for gating)

notes: The G3 0.15 criterion was frozen (freeze_protocol_commit) BEFORE the independent confirmation runs.
Seeds 777 and 888 were used only AFTER freezing, for zero-tuning confirmation, and must not be reused.
The walker checkpoint and the base-policy checkpoint are BOTH immutable dependencies (pinned by sha256).
Dataset generation must use exactly this frozen environment + controller configuration; no constant here may change.
